description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Sales Order - Simulate (A2X) API v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALES_ORDER_SIMULATE_SRV/overview). The service gives you information about pricing, material availability, and the customer's credit limit. The simulated sales order is not saved.
key-features: Simulate sales orders in SAP S/4HANA
Retrieve pricing, material availability, and credit limit information
Seamless integration with the Sales Order - Simulate (A2X) API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
